C_known_working_flows.name: Admin Login + Token
steps: Use access_token in Authorization: Bearer header for subsequent requests
C_known_working_flows.notes: Works for all user roles. Token expires in 15 minutes.

C_known_working_flows.name: Employee Directory + Profile
steps: GET /api/v1/users (returns paginated user list with meta)
C_known_working_flows.notes: Note: /api/v1/employees (list) returns 404 -- use /api/v1/users instead. Org chart at /api/v1/users/org-chart (NOT /employees/org-chart).

C_known_working_flows.name: Attendance Check-in/Check-out
steps: POST /api/v1/attendance/check-in (returns 200 or 409 if already checked in)
POST /api/v1/attendance/check-out (returns 200 or 409 if already checked out)
C_known_working_flows.notes: 409 Conflict is expected when already checked in/out for the day.

C_known_working_flows.name: Leave Application + Approval
C_known_working_flows.notes: Leave types vary by org. TechNova has Casual, Sick, Earned, Compensatory, Maternity, Paternity.

C_known_working_flows.name: Helpdesk Ticket Lifecycle
C_known_working_flows.notes: 80% resolution rate observed in simulation. Knowledge base articles also available.

C_known_working_flows.name: SSO Into External Module (Payroll Example)
steps: Module reads token from URL and authenticates
For API: capture module session cookie from redirect response
C_known_working_flows.notes: Token lifetime is 15 minutes. Same pattern for all modules (recruit, performance, rewards, exit, lms, project).

C_known_working_flows.name: Payroll Self-Service (Employee View)
C_known_working_flows.notes: Employee role in payroll module has limited access (most admin endpoints return 403).

C_known_working_flows.name: Announcement CRUD
C_known_working_flows.notes: Admin creates, employees read. Soft delete is by design.

C_known_working_flows.name: Policy + Acknowledgment
C_known_working_flows.notes: 23 pending acknowledgments in TechNova as of simulation.

C_known_working_flows.name: Survey Creation + Response
C_known_working_flows.notes: 20 surveys in TechNova. Supports engagement, pulse, and custom types.

C_known_working_flows.name: Asset Management
C_known_working_flows.notes: Asset tracking with categories, serial numbers, warranty tracking.

C_known_working_flows.name: Events CRUD + Registration
steps: POST /api/v1/events {title, description, event_type, start_date, end_date, location}
C_known_working_flows.notes: 14 events in TechNova. Calendar endpoint requires date params.

D_known_broken_flows.name: Payroll Run by Org Admin
D_known_broken_flows.error: Org admin SSO token maps to 'employee' role in payroll module, returning 403 Forbidden
D_known_broken_flows.issue: #722 - Org admin can't run payroll -- role mapped as 'employee' in payroll module
D_known_broken_flows.workaround: Use payroll's native auth (POST /api/v1/auth/login) with admin credentials if available

D_known_broken_flows.name: Payroll Run for Innovate Solutions
D_known_broken_flows.error: Payroll run fails for Innovate Solutions organization
D_known_broken_flows.issue: #727 - Payroll run fails for Innovate Solutions - March 2026
D_known_broken_flows.workaround: None known -- only TechNova payroll runs have succeeded

D_known_broken_flows.name: SSO Validate Endpoint
D_known_broken_flows.issue: Endpoint listed in README but not found on API. Modules may use direct sso_token URL param instead.
D_known_broken_flows.workaround: Use sso_token as URL parameter (e.g., ?sso_token=<token>) instead of API validate call

D_known_broken_flows.name: Password Reset
D_known_broken_flows.issue: Endpoint listed in README but not deployed
D_known_broken_flows.workaround: None -- use known passwords for testing

D_known_broken_flows.name: Wellness Module
D_known_broken_flows.workaround: Skip wellness testing -- APIs not implemented yet

D_known_broken_flows.name: Attendance Reports/Export
D_known_broken_flows.issue: Report and export endpoints not deployed

D_known_broken_flows.name: Attendance Shift Assignments
D_known_broken_flows.issue: Shift assignment listing endpoint not deployed

D_known_broken_flows.name: Document Upload
D_known_broken_flows.issue: Document upload endpoint not responding to POST
D_known_broken_flows.workaround: Documents can be read via GET /api/v1/documents

D_known_broken_flows.name: Payroll GL Accounting
D_known_broken_flows.issue: GL accounting module not deployed in payroll

smoke_tests.description: Run FIRST -- verifies basic connectivity and auth

tests.name: Org admin cannot see other org data
details: Try to access GlobalTech user IDs -> expect 404 or empty

tests.name: Payroll RBAC via SSO
details: SSO as employee -> most admin payroll endpoints return 403
SSO as org admin -> currently maps as employee (bug #722)

tests.name: Attendance + Leave = Working Days
tests.check: Cross-reference attendance records with leave applications

tests.name: Soft delete behavior
tests.check: DELETE item -> GET item still returns (by design)

skip_list.description: Tests to SKIP (known false positives or not ready)

tests.name: Rate limiting
tests.reason: All rate limits removed for testing

tests.name: Direct subdomain login
tests.reason: Modules use SSO only, not direct login

tests.name: XSS stored in DB
tests.reason: React auto-escapes, Knex parameterizes -- not exploitable

tests.name: EMP Monitor API tests
tests.reason: Different tech stack (QT/Laravel/Node.js), no standard API

F_environment.sso_mechanism: sso_token URL parameter -- navigate to module_url?sso_token=<access_token>

api_response_format.paginated: {success: true, data: [...], meta: {page, limit, total, totalPages}}

bugs.title: Day 28: Org admin can't run payroll - role mapped as 'employee' in payroll module
Day 28: Payroll run fails for Innovate Solutions - March 2026
